message:
refactor(tests): replace match+panic with assert+let-else across transports

Systematic cleanup of test assertion patterns in server tests and
all three transport modules (stdio, http, websocket):

- Replace match { Variant(v) => ..., _ => panic!(...) } with
  assert!(matches!(...)) + let-else for flat control flow
- Reduces nesting depth and makes test intent clearer
- No behavioral change — pure idiomatic Rust modernization

237 insertions / 162 deletions across 4 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
